goal: Add a 'Report a bug' button to the poster/share page (the floating FAB doesn't run there)
done: share/index.html: added 'Report a bug' to the poster action-bar → 3 buttons in normal state (Share / Report a bug / Back to Homepage; Retry shows as a 4th only on poster failure). backToReading is now a button-styled link. Added window.__MEOWTAROT_SUPABASE__ so the reporter can SEND (lazy-imports js/bug-report.js → showBugReport, needs the Supabase client). share.js: wired reportBugBtn (EN 'Report a bug' / TH 'แจ้งปัญหา', click → showBugReport). share.css: equal-thirds one-row action bar (flex:1 1 0, align-items:stretch, flex-wrap). Versioned share.css + share.js ?v=20260623r. Verified browser: buttons render one row; Report opens .mt-bug-overlay. www/share synced.
verified: real-browser /share/: Share/Report a bug/Back to Homepage one row; reportBugBtn → .mt-bug-overlay opens; supabase config present

goal: Deck-preview popup action button unclickable (reported on the InkMess preview) — taps near it did nothing
done: Hid the always-on-top Report FAB while the deck-preview popup is open (js/deck-preview.js) and restored it on close; applied the same guard to the locked-deck unlock popup (js/decks.js). Browser-verified via document.elementFromPoint at 375/390-wide mobile: the button's bottom-right edge hit #mt-report-fab before the fix, hits the button after; FAB restores on close.
root_cause: The site-wide Report FAB uses z-index:2147483000 (max) and is position:fixed bottom-right. On short/standard mobile viewports its invisible hitbox overlaps the centered deck-preview popup's full-width action button, so taps on the button's lower-right region land on the FAB instead.
fix: Suppress (display:none) the #mt-report-fab while the preview/unlock popup is open; restore prior display on close.
verified: chrome elementFromPoint at 375x667 & 390x667: pre-fix bottom-right of .mt-dp-btn returned #mt-report-fab; post-fix returns the button
FAB hidden while open, restored after backdrop close

goal: Replace the gacha deck gallery with a universal date-seeded Weekly Shop (4 featured decks, buy-specific 250) + gacha rules; remove favorites
done: New js/weekly-shop.js: deterministic ISO-week-seeded selection of 4 buyable decks (role 'shop', minus seasonal). Walks a fixed mulberry32 shuffle 4-at-a-time so it's universal (same for all users), auto-rotates Monday, guarantees no deck repeats two weeks running (8 consecutive positions mod N, N=14>=8), full coverage over time. js/shop.js: removed the full gallery + search + star/pin; renders the 4 weekly featured cells with a Buy-250 path (spend->purchaseDeck->instant reveal, no roulette); tightened gacha pool to role 'shop' && !seasonal (boo-familiar excluded); added a disabled 'Collection complete' state when every gacha deck is owned. data.js: boo-familiar marked seasonal:true. decks.js + shop.js: removed the favorite/star feature and the favorite-float sorting (decks now stable order). auth.js: weekly 'New decks!' login popup, once per ISO week, queued behind the coin popup, plain 'Got it' dismiss. CSS: weekly price row + complete state. EN/TH inline throughout (shared js, /th/ mirrors load the same bundle).
verified: chrome 390x667: Weekly Shop renders 4 cells @250, no search/stars
module sweep over 400 weeks: always exactly 4, 0 consecutive-week overlaps, seasonal never leaks, every deck featured at least once
buy flow: 400->150 coins, reveal shows, cell flips to Active
weekly news popup renders with 4 thumbs + Got it
